textByHashes.9fac448b781ed6e83f95cc2dc995df5def6a9e25: Those damn broavs! Now I'll need to start over again!
textByHashes.c597316381b319549546e8c611f1d991410ae9fe: Oh, sorry, I didn't see you come in.
textByHashes.3d4c4417e427757dee82acfdb1fa96c83874aff6: Just the usual sort of nonsense you get around here. One of the guards bought some broavs for tracking, but they keep getting distracted by my laundry and making a mess of it!
textByHashes.2c78a7705696e29cf27e8bcc33aa980d453d13e4: Movario? Oh yes I... Well, actually, I shouldn't really divulge client details. Times are tough enough as it is without me losing customers through gossiping!
textByHashes.19bac22f5f317f3190b8018c9767d0dda86b668e: Well he's a fairly regular customer of mine. In fact, I have some of his clothes here right now.
textByHashes.677f34f4d73af33d82fe07ca6a3bd97409c6f5f7: I assume so, but I don't know where.
textByHashes.e039f14407fac5ec0ebfe3d11befb42603f26f9e: Broavs? Well one of the guards bought some for tracking, but they keep getting distracted by the laundry.
textByHashes.612569aef33230f4015a2dde410772751b014118: I guess so, but they track using smell, so you'd need something that smells like him.
textByHashes.8618f566e6f493fd25291cd387a2ce68f119ee2d: Oh, I see... I really shouldn't be giving out clothes belonging to customers.
textByHashes.5242f46304298dbcd42f940bee2ae136100ffc33: Well... I was thinking that one of his shirts wouldn't last the cleaning process. I suppose you can have it, but Movario can't find out!
textByHashes.bf450df2b644fe10d387a1b746c01372d2fdf328: I think they came from the Feldip Hills. Apparently there's some hunting expert down there who knows how to catch them.
textByHashes.8c6fb9360327a25b6d179a9d9019b10e7df8311e: Oh... yes, I suppose I can.
textByHashes.9e062a42fb71830c0ac9bf0bcf1fcaf5bfbe46d6: Hello there. What can I do for you?
textByHashes.ce6b2d1becf59a204c700c3bc8751a32b5148224: I mainly take in washing and make sure it's good and clean for my customers. Times are tough though. Not everyone can afford such a service and it's affecting my takings.
textByHashes.8f257211a332defe18f99292159e9a6be0012ffd: Well it can be a bit monotonous and the pay isn't good, but I set myself some goals and deliver my washing clean. My customers rarely complain, so I guess I must be doing something right.
textByHashes.40556dda3cb70b58b3d4127a81c30b4a8f822f68: Hello again. Do you need anything?
textByHashes.1c26d2e366e9d0c7e8026cce8d6a2f8ba033fcd0: Well in that case, all the best.
